port.description: HTTP port of the status-backend API (default: 21405)

keyUID.description: Key UID of the Status account (hex string)

password.description: Account password for the Status account

dataDir.description: Path to the status-backend data directory (default: ~/.status-backend/data)

name.description: Optional display label for this account

allowFrom.description: Public keys allowed to send DMs (for allowlist policy)
